label: Euchologion and Songs and Readings of Ordinary Days

work.desc_title: Songs and Readings of the Ordinary Days

excerpt.as_written: ܥܠ ܚܝܠܗ ܕܡܪܢ ܝܫܘܥ ܡܫܝܚܐ ܟܬܒܝ̇ܢܢ ܙܘܡܪ̇ܐ ܘܩܪ̇ܝܢܐ ܕܝܘ̈ܡܬܐ ܫܚ̈ܝܡܐ
